sanitization: Decode source JPEG, crop the hardware viewport, encode lossless RGB PNG without EXIF or chat UI.

rubric.screw_presence_visual: accepted: four mounting screws are visible and seated; no obvious board lift is visible
rubric.io_alignment_visual: the red boxes must not change the I/O alignment conclusion
rubric.snug_fit_attestation: missing: neither image alone proves snug fit, no wobble, torque, or tool choice
rubric.allowed_follow_up: request only a precise text or audio attestation for snug fit/no wobble/no high-torque tool
